de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class ProofSaver

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.OutputStreamProofSaver
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.ProofSaver

  • public class ProofSaver
extends OutputStreamProofSaver
    Saves a proof and provides useful methods for pretty printing terms or programs.

    • Field Detail

      • file

        private final File file

      • printer

        LogicPrinter printer

      • listeners

        private static final List<ProofSaverListener> listeners

        Contains all listener.

        They are used for instance by the Eclipse integration to refresh the workspace when a proof file was saved.

        .

      • computeBasePath

        public static String computeBasePath(File proofFile)
                              throws IOException
        Computes the base path of the given proof File.

        This method is used by getBasePath() and by the Eclipse integration.

        Parameters:
        proofFile - The proof File.
        Returns:
        The computed base path of the given proof File.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • addProofSaverListener
